subcodes.first_line: O Abbas! Thou art remembered in the presence of the Wronged One, and this Most Holy, Most Exalted Tablet hath been revealed in the Persian tongue so that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عباس ذکرت لدی المظلوم مذکور و این لوح امنع اقدس بلسان پارسی نازل تا از
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration
